mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months following a rate cut, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing above 5.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately trigger risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power during low-volatility periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns when GDPC1 and RSAFS diverge, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio falls below 0.5.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices indicate recovering manufacturing capacity that supports corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to correlate with positive 20-day returns during supply-constrained periods, or Rank IC turns negative in recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above a 0.4% monthly threshold forces expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in >50% of months following CPIAUCSL spikes above 0.4%, or the signal shows zero predictive accuracy in high-inflation environments.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending expectations and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal predicts negative 60-day returns in >45% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in housing starts reflect rising household confidence and construction sector activity, which directly translates to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: HOUST increases fail to predict positive 20-day returns, or the signal Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all tested rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production dropping below the 105.0 index level signals severe manufacturing contraction that triggers immediate risk aversion and negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 5-day returns in >65% of instances when INDPRO breaches the 105.0 threshold, or the signal fails to maintain predictive power during contraction phases.
